title: Ferment Celery Bliss
description: A sweet and juicy vegan-friendly Greek dish featuring celery salt, fermented vegetables, and other natural flavors to energize your morning.

ingredients.name: fermented vegetables (such as kombucha or water kefir), crushed
ingredients.notes: or other fermented veggies like kimchi or sauerkraut

instructions: Wash the celery thoroughly and snap off any tough bottom ends.
In a small bowl, combine crushed fermented vegetables, minced garlic, lime juice, honey or maple syrup, and sea salt if using. Mix well until smooth.
Slice the celery into bite-sized pieces and gently toss with the dressing mixture to coat evenly.
Serve immediately as a refreshing snack or spread on whole-grain crackers for an appetizer.
